impact: The Stripe webhook and app signing contracts currently model one active secret. Future consumers may need a current/previous validation window during Stripe webhook secret rotation, app signing material rotation, and rolling deploys so in-flight callbacks or tokens remain verifiable until their overlap expires.
resolution: Added explicit current/previous rotation-window fields for Stripe webhook and app signing secrets, validated the previous secret plus expiry pair, documented the rotation payloads, and added Stripe webhook verification fallback to an unexpired previous secret.
title: Signing secret contracts need current/previous rotation window
